name: orcarouter-mcp
description: Browse 160+ LLM models with live pricing — no API key needed for catalog. Route chat completions through OrcaRouter with automatic fallback.
long_description:
OrcaRouter MCP exposes the OrcaRouter LLM gateway (OpenAI-compatible, 160+ models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Qwen, DeepSeek, etc.) as 4 MCP tools.

**Catalog tools** (no API key required):
- `orcarouter_models_list` — browse models with live pricing, context window, capabilities
- `orcarouter_model_card` — per-model detail (pricing, latency, modalities, endpoints)
- `orcarouter_providers_list` — list providers and model counts

**Chat** (API key required):
- `orcarouter_chat` — single-turn chat with optional fallback chain (up to 5 models, automatic retry on failure)

For OpenAI reasoning models (gpt-5/o1/o3/...), `max_tokens` is automatically routed to `max_completion_tokens` at the wire level. The MCP server speaks the standard 2025-06-18 protocol revision over stdio.

api_key.title: OrcaRouter API Key
api_key.description: Optional. Catalog tools (models_list, model_card, providers_list) work without a key. Required only for orcarouter_chat. Get one at https://www.orcarouter.ai/console
